✨ Try it on your own image
You'll get a real, live read from our models — not a saved demo. Just two quick things so we keep everyone safe: ScanGuru gives an AI-assisted read that a clinician reviews — a confident second pair of eyes, not the final word. And please use a sample or de-identified image (nothing that identifies a real patient). That's it — tick the box and go.

Clinician-reviewed decision support. This is an interactive research demonstration. AI output must be reviewed and confirmed by a qualified clinician before any clinical decision. Currently offered for research use — not FDA cleared or CE marked.
Not intended for: autonomous diagnosis · replacing clinical judgment · emergency triage · direct-to-patient use without a clinician.
